channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Italy blocked AI app DeepSeek in Apple and Google stores. Here’s why
item.description: The Chinese artificial intelligence app DeepSeek could not be accessed on Wednesday in Apple and Google app stores in Italy, the day after the country’s data protection authority requested information on its use of personal data.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: La seguridad cuántica acerca a IBM y Telefónica Tech con un nuevo acuerdo de colaboración
item.description: La computación cuántica es una disciplina por la que muchas organizaciones están apostando firmemente, especialmente en el desarrollo y las garantías de una tecnología criptográficamente segura, dados los desafíos futuros a los que podrían enfrentarse.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Purchasing the future you want
item.description: Procurement and sustainability professionals recognise the vital role sustainable procurement plays in “purchasing the future we want.” There has never been a more pressing set of indicators demonstrating the scale of the issues facing humans and the planet.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: US cybersecurity agency's future role in elections remains murky under the Trump administration
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The nation’s cybersecurity agency has played a critical role in helping states shore up the defenses of their voting systems, but its election mission appears uncertain amid sustained criticism from Republicans and key figures in the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINA A. CASSIDY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: HPE-Juniper Acquisition: A Timeline of Key Events and Regulatory Scrutiny
item.description: Hewlett Packard Enterprise's proposed acquisition of Juniper Networks has sparked significant regulatory scrutiny worldwide, with the US Department of Justice suing to block the deal.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Amazon sues state agency to block release of company records to Bezos-owned Washington Post
item.description: Amazon is suing a Washington state agency to prevent the release of some company materials to The Washington Post, the newspaper which is owned by Amazon founder Jeff Bezos.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Larry Magid: Testing DeepSeek, the Chinese generative AI app
item.description: Based on my tests and published reports, DeepSeek not yet as advanced as its American counterparts, but it’s quite good
item.dc:creator: Larry Magid, The Mercury News

item.title: Microsoft reports 10% quarterly profit growth as it works to show AI investments paying off
item.description: Microsoft said Wednesday that its profit for the October-December quarter grew 10% as it works to capitalize on the huge amounts of money it has spent to advance its artificial intelligence technology.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Cybersecurity has had its ups and downs as we head into 2025
item.description: Last year was an eventful one on the cybersecurity front. But big cyber developments in the federal scape are expected in 2025. The post Cybersecurity has had its ups and downs as we head into 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: DeepSeek's new AI chatbot and ChatGPT answer sensitive questions about China differently
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — Chinese tech startup DeepSeek ’s new artificial intelligence chatbot has sparked discussions about the competition between China and the U.S. in AI development, with many users flocking to test the rival of OpenAI's ChatGPT. DeepSeek’s AI assistant was the No.
item.dc:creator: KANIS LEUNG, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Upstart Chinese AI company DeepSeek's founder started out as a low-key hedge fund entrepreneur
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — The 40-year-old founder of China’s DeepSeek, an AI startup that has startled markets with its capacity to compete with industry leaders like OpenAI, kept a low profile as he built up a hedge fund and then refined its quantitative models to branch into artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: How to advance federal workforce efficiencies amid shifting priorities
item.description: Agencies can save time and money — and increase hiring success — by moving to modern human resources solutions, workforce tech experts explain. The post How to advance federal workforce efficiencies amid shifting priorities first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Java-based organizations mostly use Java for AI development – report
item.description: Azul Systems, in its Azul 2025 State of Java Survey & Report, says that Java leads Python and JavaScript for AI development in Java shops, based on a survey of 2,039 Java professionals on six continents.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How to share a YouTube video starting at a specific time
item.description: Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says these steps ensure that your friends and family get to the exact moment you want them to see. Try it out and streamline your sharing experience.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Top 8 outages of 2024
item.description: Network outages continued to plague organizations of all sizes in 2024, with major incidents exposing vulnerabilities in digital infrastructure and the growing complexity of IT environments, according to ThousandEyes’ recent Internet outage report.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Trump says Microsoft is one of the companies eyeing TikTok
item.description: President Donald Trump said Monday evening that Microsoft is among the U.S. companies looking to take control of TikTok to help the popular app avert an effective ban that could kick-in in April.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Salt Typhoon ignites new federal push for mobile security best practices
item.description: In the wake of the Salt Typhoon hack, agencies are looking to secure their mobile data using encryption and other techniques. The post Salt Typhoon ignites new federal push for mobile security best practices first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Disabling, narrowing Apple Intelligence is just a few swipes away
item.description: A suite of artificial intelligence features is enabled automatically with Monday’s release of iOS 18.3.
item.dc:creator: Michael Ramsey, NewsNation

item.title: A busy stock market week bookended by DeepSeek and Trump tariffs, by the numbers
item.description: News from China upset U.S. markets Monday and disrupted the frenzy that had built up around artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Cell service getting worse? One study suggests that it is
item.description: The study, from J.D. Power, showed an increase in reported wireless network problems between the first and the second half of 2024.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, NewsNation

item.title: Prompt Security adds code sanitization, data leak prevention for GitHub Copilot
item.description: Prompt Security has announced an upgrade to its security and governance platform for GitHub Copilot and other AI coding assistants.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Families sue TikTok in France over teen suicides they say are linked to harmful content
item.description: CASSIS, France (AP) — In the moment when her world shattered three years ago, Stephanie Mistre found her 15-year-old daughter, Marie, lifeless in the bedroom where she died by suicide.
item.dc:creator: TOM NOUVIAN, Associated Press, Fox 5
